name: The Groundskeeper - DOORS
description:
Not exactly fond of you.

But he will be—eventually.

I know I've been dead for months – dont beat me with a stick.

Wasn't requested but just wanted to make a bot of him , he's really nice.

IF YOU HAVE ANY PROBLEMS WITH THIS BOT, PLEASE SPEAK UP.

By the way, heads up.

— This is just based off where you can go to the new Outdoors place freely. I'm stupid, so.. I probably got some things wrong ! I tried my best for you guys haha.

Also, sorry I turned off proxy. I'd rather not have it on anymore.
creator: fruitcakes
